Example_EN: The book on the table is mine.
MemoryTip: 元音前常读 /ðiː/，辅音前读 /ðə/。

Example_EN: She wants to be a doctor one day.
Example_CN: 她希望有一天成为医生。
MemoryTip: am/is/are/was/were 都是 be 的词形。

Collocation: and so on;bread and butter;and then
Example_EN: Tom and Lily walked home together.
Example_CN: 汤姆和莉莉一起走回家。
MemoryTip: 连接对等成分，可记成“一加一”。

Example_EN: This is a photo of my family.
MemoryTip: 弱读常见 /əv/，别总读成 /ɒv/。

Example_EN: I need to finish my homework tonight.
MemoryTip: 作不定式时多弱读 /tə/。

Example_EN: She bought a gift for her friend.
Example_CN: 她给朋友买了一份礼物。
MemoryTip: 辅音前用 a，元音前改用 an。

Example_EN: There are three books in the bag.
MemoryTip: in 像走进门里。

Example_EN: They have a small flat near the station.
Example_CN: 他们在车站附近有一套小公寓。
MemoryTip: 完成时里 have/has + 过去分词。

Example_EN: It is raining hard this afternoon.
MemoryTip: 指物、动物、时间天气常用 it。

Example_EN: Can you help me with this box?
Example_CN: 你能帮我搬这个箱子吗？
MemoryTip: 单复数同形，语气看语境。

Example_EN: He is waiting for the bus outside.
MemoryTip: 主格 he，宾格 him，所有格 his。

Example_EN: This gift is for your sister.
Example_CN: 这份礼物是给你妹妹的。
MemoryTip: 表目的、对象或时间长度都很常见。

Example_EN: They arrived early for the meeting.
Example_CN: 他们早早到了会议现场。
MemoryTip: 主格 they，宾格 them，所有格 their。

Example_EN: I do not want to go out tonight.
MemoryTip: 常缩成 n't，如 don't / isn't。

Example_EN: I think that the answer is correct.
Example_CN: 我认为这个答案是正确的。
MemoryTip: 可指物，也可引导 that 从句。

Example_EN: We are planning a trip next month.
Example_CN: 我们计划下个月去旅行。
MemoryTip: 主格 we，宾格 us，所有格 our。

Example_EN: The keys are on the kitchen table.
MemoryTip: 接触表面用 on，反义常想 off。

Example_EN: She went to the cinema with her friends.
Example_CN: 她和朋友们一起去看电影了。
MemoryTip: with 的反义是 without。

Example_EN: This café makes excellent coffee.
MemoryTip: 近处 this，远处 that；复数 these。

Example_EN: I usually get up at seven.
MemoryTip: 句子开头须大写 I。

Example_EN: What do you usually do at weekends?
MemoryTip: 疑问/否定句里常用 do/does/did。

Example_EN: She works as a nurse in hospital.
MemoryTip: as…as 表示同等比较。

Example_EN: We will meet at the station at six.
MemoryTip: 具体时刻、较小地点常用 at。

Example_EN: She teaches English at our school.
MemoryTip: 主格 she，宾格 her，所有格 her。

Collocation: but also;nothing but;last but not least
Example_EN: I like tea, but I prefer coffee.
MemoryTip: 转折用 but，语气比 however 更口语。

Example_EN: This letter is from my uncle in London.
Example_CN: 这封信来自我在伦敦的叔叔。
MemoryTip: from A to B：从 A 到 B。

Example_EN: The report was written by my colleague.
Example_CN: 这份报告是我同事写的。
MemoryTip: 被动语态里 by 引出动作执行者。

Example_EN: They will call you tomorrow morning.
Example_CN: 他们明天早上会给你打电话。
MemoryTip: 表将来也表意愿；won't = will not。

Example_EN: Would you like tea or coffee?
MemoryTip: either…or… 表示二选一。

Collocation: say hello;say sorry;that is to say
Example_EN: Please say your name clearly.
Example_CN: 请清楚地说出你的名字。
MemoryTip: say 侧重说的内容；tell 常带对象。

Example_EN: We usually go to school by bike.
Example_CN: 我们通常骑自行车去上学。
MemoryTip: go + -ing：go swimming / go shopping。

Example_EN: It was raining, so we stayed inside.
Example_CN: 下雨了，所以我们待在屋里。
MemoryTip: 既表程度（so tired），也表结果。

Example_EN: All students must wear school uniforms.
Example_CN: 所有学生都必须穿校服。
MemoryTip: all of us = 我们全部。

Example_EN: If it rains, we will cancel the trip.
Example_CN: 如果下雨，我们就取消这次旅行。
MemoryTip: 真实条件用 will；虚拟则改时态。

Example_EN: One of my friends lives abroad.
Example_CN: 我的一个朋友住在国外。
MemoryTip: 可替代前文名词：this one / that one。

Example_EN: I would like a glass of water, please.
MemoryTip: would like = want 的更礼貌说法。

Example_EN: We talked about our weekend plans after lunch.
Example_CN: 午饭后我们聊了周末的计划。
MemoryTip: about 可记成绕着一件事转。

Example_EN: Can you open the window, please?
MemoryTip: 否定 can't；过去/委婉用 could。

Example_EN: Which colour do you prefer?
MemoryTip: 问选择用 which；非限定从句也常用。

Example_EN: There is a park near my house.
MemoryTip: there be 表“存在”，非地点时也可用。

Collocation: know about;get to know;as you know
Example_EN: Do you know the way to the museum?
Example_CN: 你知道去博物馆怎么走吗？
MemoryTip: know that… = 知道某事属实。

Example_EN: I need more time to finish this task.
Example_CN: 我需要更多时间完成这项任务。
MemoryTip: 比较级：more + 多音节形容词。

Example_EN: How do I get to the railway station?
MemoryTip: 短语很多：get on / get off / get over。

Example_EN: Who left this bag on the chair?
MemoryTip: 主格 who，宾格正式场合用 whom。

Example_EN: She looks like her mother.
MemoryTip: 作介词表“像”，作动词表“喜欢”。

Example_EN: When does the train arrive?
MemoryTip: 既问时间，也引导时间从句。

Example_EN: I think we should leave early.
Example_CN: 我认为我们该早点出发。
MemoryTip: think of=想起；think about=考虑。

Example_EN: She made a cake for the party.
Example_CN: 她为派对做了一个蛋糕。
MemoryTip: make sb do = 让某人做某事。

Example_EN: We do not have much time left.
Example_CN: 我们剩下的时间不多了。
MemoryTip: times 可表倍数或次数。

Example_EN: Did you see the notice on the board?
Example_CN: 你看到黑板上的通知了吗？
MemoryTip: see 无意识看见；watch 有意观看。

Example_EN: What is your favourite subject?
Example_CN: 你最喜欢的科目是什么？
MemoryTip: What a day! 感叹句很常见。

Example_EN: Please stand up when the teacher comes in.
MemoryTip: 大量动词短语含 up，表完成或上升。

Example_EN: Would you like some tea?
MemoryTip: 肯定句多用 some，疑问/否定常改 any。

Example_EN: Do you have any other questions?
MemoryTip: the other=两者中另一个；others=其他人/物。

Example_EN: She went out for a short walk.
MemoryTip: out of = 从……出来 / 用完。

Example_EN: This is a good place for a picnic.
Example_CN: 这是一个野餐的好地方。
MemoryTip: better / best 是其比较级与最高级。

Example_EN: Many people use public transport every day.
Example_CN: 许多人每天使用公共交通。
MemoryTip: 通常当复数：people are…。

Example_EN: She spent a year studying abroad.
MemoryTip: years old 表示年龄。

Example_EN: It takes twenty minutes to walk there.
Example_CN: 步行到那里要二十分钟。
MemoryTip: take 强调带走；bring 强调带来。

Example_EN: There is no milk left in the fridge.
MemoryTip: no + 名词 = not any + 名词。

Example_EN: She speaks English very well.
MemoryTip: 作形容词常指健康：feel well。

Example_EN: We stayed indoors because it was cold.
Example_CN: 因为天冷，我们待在室内。
MemoryTip: because of + 名词短语。

Example_EN: The film was very interesting.
MemoryTip: very + 形容词/副词，不可直接修饰动词。

Example_EN: I have just finished my homework.
MemoryTip: 完成时里 just 表“刚刚”。

Example_EN: Please come to my office after class.
Example_CN: 下课后请到我办公室来。
MemoryTip: come 朝说话者来；go 离开说话者。

Chinese: 能；可以；可能（过去或委婉）
Example_EN: Could you open the door for me?
MemoryTip: 比 can 更礼貌，也表过去能力。

Example_EN: She started work at nine this morning.
Example_CN: 她今天早上九点开始工作。
MemoryTip: 不可数常指劳动；job 多指具体职位。

Example_EN: May I use your phone for a minute?
Example_CN: 我可以用一下你的手机吗？
MemoryTip: 动词读 /juːz/，名词读 /juːs/。

Example_EN: This book is longer than that one.
MemoryTip: 比较级后接 than。

Example_EN: We need to leave now or we will be late.
Example_CN: 我们现在就得走，否则会迟到。
MemoryTip: now and then = 偶尔。

Example_EN: First wash the vegetables, then cook them.
MemoryTip: 既表顺序，也表“那时”。

Collocation: not only also;and also;also known as
Example_EN: She can also speak a little French.
MemoryTip: also 多在句中；too 常在句末。

Example_EN: He walked into the classroom quietly.
MemoryTip: 强调进入内部：into the room。

Example_EN: Only three people came to the meeting.
MemoryTip: 位置不同可能改变句子重点。

Example_EN: Please look at the board carefully.
MemoryTip: look at/for/after 搭配义差很大。

Example_EN: I want to learn how to cook.
MemoryTip: want sb to do = 想让某人做。

Example_EN: Could you give me some advice?
MemoryTip: give sb sth 或 give sth to sb。

Example_EN: First, we need to check the timetable.
Example_CN: 首先，我们需要核对时刻表。
MemoryTip: at first=起初；first of all=首先。

Example_EN: They moved into a new flat last week.
Example_CN: 他们上周搬进了新公寓。
MemoryTip: new to sth = 对……不熟悉。

Collocation: by the way;on the way;in this way
Example_EN: Is this the way to the post office?
MemoryTip: way 既指路，也指做事方法。

Collocation: find out;find it hard;find a way
Example_EN: I cannot find my keys anywhere.
MemoryTip: find out = 查明事实。

Example_EN: The meeting will be over by five.
MemoryTip: be over = 结束；get over = 克服。

Example_EN: Do you have any questions about the text?
Example_CN: 你对课文有任何问题吗？
MemoryTip: 疑问否定用 any；肯定常用 some。

Example_EN: We went for a walk after dinner.
MemoryTip: after all = 毕竟。

Example_EN: What a beautiful day it is today!
MemoryTip: day by day = 一天天。

Example_EN: Where did you put the tickets?
MemoryTip: 既问地点，也引导地点从句。

Collocation: for one thing;the thing is;among other things
Example_EN: I have many things to do this weekend.
Example_CN: 这个周末我有很多事要做。
MemoryTip: 口语里 thing 常泛指事情。

Example_EN: Most students in this class like sports.
Example_CN: 这个班大多数学生喜欢运动。
MemoryTip: the most + 形容词 = 最高级。

Example_EN: You should drink more water every day.
MemoryTip: should have done = 本该做却未做。

Example_EN: We need more chairs for the meeting.
Example_CN: 我们开会需要更多椅子。
MemoryTip: 实义动词 need to do；情态否定 needn't。

Example_EN: There is not much sugar left.
MemoryTip: much 修不可数；many 修可数。

Example_EN: Turn right at the next traffic lights.
Example_CN: 在下一个红绿灯处右转。
MemoryTip: 既表对错，也表左右与权利。

Example_EN: How can I improve my listening skills?
MemoryTip: how + adj./adv. 可表感叹。

Example_EN: Please put the book back on the shelf.
MemoryTip: back 作动词也可表“支持”。

Collocation: mean to;what do you mean;by means of
Example_EN: What does this word mean?
MemoryTip: I mean… 常用来澄清说法。

Example_EN: Even a child can understand this rule.
Example_CN: 连小孩子都能理解这条规则。
MemoryTip: even if = 即使。

Example_EN: You may leave when you finish the test.
MemoryTip: 表允许或可能性；大写 May 是五月。

Example_EN: Please sit here next to me.
MemoryTip: Here you are. = 给你。

Example_EN: Many shops are closed on Sunday.
MemoryTip: many + 复数名词。

Example_EN: I have never seen such a beautiful sunset.
Example_CN: 我从未见过如此美丽的日落。
MemoryTip: such as = 例如；such a + 单数名词。
